topic: Ifo Business Climate Index recent history
summary: Jan 2026 Ifo at 87.6 (unchanged from Dec). Monthly data Jan-Dec 2025: 85.4, 85.3, 86.7, 86.8, 87.4, 88.2, 88.5, 88.8, 87.7, 88.4, 88.0, 87.6. Peak was 88.8 in Aug 2025. Monthly change SD ~0.66 pts.
content:
Full monthly series from Ifo press release (Jan 2026):
Jan 2025: 85.4
Feb 2025: 85.3
Mar 2025: 86.7
Apr 2025: 86.8
May 2025: 87.4
Jun 2025: 88.2
Jul 2025: 88.5
Aug 2025: 88.8 (peak)
Sep 2025: 87.7
Oct 2025: 88.4
Nov 2025: 88.0
Dec 2025: 87.6
Jan 2026: 87.6

Key sub-components Jan 2026:
- Current situation: 85.7 (vs 85.6 prior, slight improvement)
- Expectations: 89.5 (vs 89.7 prior, slight decline)

Monthly changes have SD of ~0.66 points with slight upward drift of +0.18/month over 2025.
Recent 4-month trend is flat-to-declining (from 88.8 peak in Aug).
